rules.name: Direct inheritance
rules.requiredAction: Reference the frozen source ID and evidence without copying or redefining it.

rules.name: Local revalidation inheritance
rules.requiredAction: Record required local checks and keep the field non-production-eligible until evidence is approved.

rules.name: Review-required inheritance
rules.requiredAction: Route to Human Review; do not infer approval.

rules.name: Full Gate revalidation prohibition
rules.requiredAction: Exclude the field from the Draft and reopen affected Gates.

rules.name: Frozen core change prohibition
rules.requiredAction: Stop inheritance and follow Gate-11 full revalidation.

rules.name: Existing references only
rules.requirement: Every inherited reference resolves to an existing frozen Character Unit, Material DNA, Palette, Cloud Collar or Production Rule.

rules.name: No new definitions
rules.requiredAction: Reject creation in this execution layer and route to the governing Gate.

rules.name: Evidence per classification
rules.requirement: Each result records sourcePath, sourceId, matchedRuleIds, evidence, classification and requiredAction.
